problem: Can addiction-related neural pathway changes be reversed without withdrawal?
mechanism: Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI
hypothesis: If Default mode network connectivity measurement via fMRI is applied to reversed, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 32 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: In the beginner's mind there are many possibilities. In the expert's mind there are few. — Shunryu Suzuki
